Method.desc: Build a styled menu bar title with a small dot and a label, optionally colored.
Method.doc:
Build a styled menu bar title with a small dot and a label, optionally colored.

Parameters:
 * dot - emoji string for the status indicator
 * label - directory name string
 * color - optional hs.drawing.color table applied to both dot and label


Returns:
 * hs.styledtext object
Method.name: styledTitle
parameters: * dot - emoji string for the status indicator
* color - optional hs.drawing.color table applied to both dot and label

Method.desc: Extract a short display name from a full directory path.
Method.doc:
Extract a short display name from a full directory path.
Returns "~" for the home directory, or the basename otherwise.
Prepends agent count if > 0 (e.g., "×3 dialtone").

Parameters:
 * pwd - full directory path, or nil
 * agents - number of active subagents, or nil


Returns:
 * string label for the menu bar
Method.name: dirLabel
parameters: * pwd - full directory path, or nil
* agents - number of active subagents, or nil
returns: * string label for the menu bar

Method.desc: Focus the IDE window for the given directory by opening it via `open -a`.
Method.doc:
Focus the IDE window for the given directory by opening it via `open -a`.
macOS handles switching to the correct Space automatically.
Falls back to activating the IDE app, then the terminal app.

Parameters:
 * pwd - full directory path from the Claude session
Method.name: focusIdeWindow
parameters: * pwd - full directory path from the Claude session

Method.desc: Scan all status files, update menu bar items, and clean up stale entries.
Method.doc:
Scan all status files, update menu bar items, and clean up stale entries.
Called by the pathwatcher and poll timer.

For each ~/.claude/status-<pid> file:
 1. Remove if the PID is no longer running (dead process cleanup)
 2. Debounce "calling" state — ignore if less than debounceSeconds old
    (filters auto-approved PermissionRequest flicker)
 3. Create or update the corresponding menu bar item
 4. Remove menu bar items for sessions that no longer have status files
Method.name: update

Method.desc: Advance the working animation frame and update titles for all "working" sessions.
Method.doc:
Advance the working animation frame and update titles for all "working" sessions.
Called by the animation timer. No file I/O — only updates menu bar title strings.
Method.name: animate

Method.desc: Start watching for Claude Code status changes.
Method.doc:
Start watching for Claude Code status changes.
Creates a pathwatcher on the status directory, a poll timer for missed events,
and an animation timer for the "working" state.

Returns:
 * The ClaudeStatus object
Method.name: start

Method.desc: Stop all watchers, timers, and remove all menu bar items.
Method.doc:
Stop all watchers, timers, and remove all menu bar items.

Returns:
 * The ClaudeStatus object
Method.name: stop

Variable.desc: Directory where Claude Code status files are stored. Default: ~/.claude
Variable.doc: Directory where Claude Code status files are stored. Default: ~/.claude
Variable.name: statusDir

Variable.desc: Seconds between full status file scans. Compensates for missed pathwatcher events. Default: 2
Variable.doc: Seconds between full status file scans. Compensates for missed pathwatcher events. Default: 2
Variable.name: pollInterval

Variable.desc: Seconds between animation frame changes for the "working" state. Default: 0.3
Variable.doc: Seconds between animation frame changes for the "working" state. Default: 0.3
Variable.name: animInterval

Variable.desc: Seconds a "calling" status must persist before showing yellow.
Variable.doc:
Seconds a "calling" status must persist before showing yellow.
Filters out brief flickers from auto-approved tool permission requests. Default: 2
Variable.name: debounceSeconds

Variable.desc: Font used for the status dot emoji. Default: { size = 6 }
Variable.doc: Font used for the status dot emoji. Default: { size = 6 }
Variable.name: dotFont

Variable.desc: Emoji strings for non-animated states. Keys: "calling", "done", "error".
Variable.doc: Emoji strings for non-animated states. Keys: "calling", "done", "error".
Variable.name: statusDots

Variable.desc: Array of emoji strings that cycle to animate the "working" state.
Variable.doc: Array of emoji strings that cycle to animate the "working" state.
Variable.name: workingFrames

Variable.desc: hs.drawing.color table for the "calling" state background. Default: #d97757
Variable.doc: hs.drawing.color table for the "calling" state background. Default: #d97757
Variable.name: callingColor

Variable.desc: hs.drawing.color table for the "working" state text. Default: #d97757
Variable.doc: hs.drawing.color table for the "working" state text. Default: #d97757
Variable.name: workingColor

Variable.desc: hs.drawing.color table for the "error" state text. Default: red
Variable.doc: hs.drawing.color table for the "error" state text. Default: red
Variable.name: errorColor

Variable.desc: Name of the terminal application to activate on menu bar click. Default: "Warp"
Variable.doc: Name of the terminal application to activate on menu bar click. Default: "Warp"
Variable.name: terminalApp

Variable.desc: Name of the IDE application to focus on menu bar click. Default: "Windsurf"
Variable.doc: Name of the IDE application to focus on menu bar click. Default: "Windsurf"
Variable.name: ideApp

desc: Per-session menu bar status indicator for Claude Code.
doc:
Per-session menu bar status indicator for Claude Code.

Each active Claude Code session gets its own menu bar item showing the
working directory name and a color-coded status dot.

Download: [https://github.com/francisrupert/ClaudeStatus.spoon](https://github.com/francisrupert/ClaudeStatus.spoon)

items.doc: Seconds between full status file scans. Compensates for missed pathwatcher events. Default: 2
items.name: pollInterval

items.doc: Seconds between animation frame changes for the "working" state. Default: 0.3
items.name: animInterval

items.doc: Font used for the status dot emoji. Default: { size = 6 }
